\"admin\";\n  plan: string;\n  iat: number;        // issued at\n  exp: number;        // expires (1 hour)\n}\n\n// Refresh Token\ninterface RefreshPayload {\n  sub: string;\n  token_version: number;\n  exp: number;        // expires (7 days)\n}\n\n// Row Level Security\npolicies: {\n  \"users can only read own data\":\n    auth.uid() = user_id,\n  \"admins can read all\":\n    auth.jwt()->>'role' = 'admin'\n}"}]}]}]]}]]}]
